phrases.intent_en: When does the next bus to Prague leave?
phrases.text_local: Kdy jede další autobus do Prahy?
phrases.cultural_note: Staff often add the platform number automatically when giving departure times.

likely_response.local: Za patnáct minut, z nástupiště sedm.
likely_response.translation_en: In fifteen minutes, from platform seven.

responses.english: In fifteen minutes, from platform seven.
responses.local: Za patnáct minut, z nástupiště sedm.

phrases.cultural_note: Multiple machines exist; specifying location helps avoid confusion if one is out of order.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, the one by the entrance is working.

responses.english: Yes, the one by the entrance is working.

phrases.cultural_note: RegioJet is a private carrier with its own counter, often separate from the main ČSAD ticket windows.

likely_response.local: V hlavní hale, vpravo vedle informací.
likely_response.translation_en: In the main hall, on the right next to the information desk.

responses.english: In the main hall, on the right next to the information desk.
responses.local: V hlavní hale, vpravo vedle informací.

phrases.intent_en: Can I pay the driver in cash?
phrases.cultural_note: Drivers usually accept cash but prefer exact change or small bills to avoid delays.
Platform numbering can be inconsistent; giving a landmark like the underpass helps orientation.

likely_response.translation_en: Straight, then left after the underpass.

responses.english: Straight, then left after the underpass.
